title: CIVIC ENGAGEMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: POLITISIT CIVIC ENGAGEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides child care cost reimbursement for parents or caretakers of minors who want to participate in civic engagement, such as attending school board meetings, city council meetings, meetings with elected officials, advocacy training, parent-teacher association (PTA) meetings, voting, and other civic engagement as approved. Protest activities and marches are not included. Participation must be voluntary and not part of the job, internship, or other employment. Eligibility: Parents and caretakers of children age 15 and younger who want to become more civically engaged Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete an application, email for more information. Requests are prioritized for those with the greatest need and least civic engagement experience. FEES: None; scholarship is limited to $200 or 15 hours, whichever comes first, in monthly child care funding requests. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Child Care Expense Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
